nodes.label: Tier-2 mismatch does not zero the reward (flag-only)
nodes.norm_label: tier-2 mismatch does not zero the reward (flag-only)

nodes.label: Reward-inflation bug fix (separate credit terms, not combined)
nodes.norm_label: reward-inflation bug fix (separate credit terms, not combined)

nodes.label: Decision: boss damage decoupled from brick HP (1 hit = 1 boss HP)
nodes.norm_label: decision: boss damage decoupled from brick hp (1 hit = 1 boss hp)

nodes.label: bossDefeated authority scoped to client-side engine only
nodes.norm_label: bossdefeated authority scoped to client-side engine only

nodes.label: Two separate credit call paths fix (multiplied vs flat)
nodes.norm_label: two separate credit call paths fix (multiplied vs flat)

nodes.label: Pillar: Every mini-game is a real pillar
nodes.norm_label: pillar: every mini-game is a real pillar

nodes.label: Coin Value multiplier double-applied to boss bonus bug
nodes.norm_label: coin value multiplier double-applied to boss bonus bug

nodes.norm_label: undefined bossdefeated authority conflict (boss ai vs anti-cheat)

nodes.label: Boss HP scaling diverges from board cap — unwinnable late-game bug
nodes.norm_label: boss hp scaling diverges from board cap — unwinnable late-game bug

nodes.label: Games section scales from 2 to 5 hero-cards
nodes.norm_label: games section scales from 2 to 5 hero-cards

nodes.label: boss_hp hard cap at level 30 (11,100) — structural fix
nodes.norm_label: boss_hp hard cap at level 30 (11,100) — structural fix

nodes.label: Local cache never authoritative for rewards
nodes.norm_label: local cache never authoritative for rewards

nodes.label: Win takes priority over same-frame loss
nodes.norm_label: win takes priority over same-frame loss

nodes.label: Fail-open failure mode decision (superseded clawback wording)
nodes.norm_label: fail-open failure mode decision (superseded clawback wording)

nodes.label: ADR-0007: flag-only reward model (referenced, supersedes ADR-0001 clawback)
nodes.norm_label: adr-0007: flag-only reward model (referenced, supersedes adr-0001 clawback)

nodes.label: Distance sub-stepping driven by remaining distance
nodes.norm_label: distance sub-stepping driven by remaining distance

nodes.label: Risk & Staffing Budget spike gate (blocking for Accepted status)
nodes.norm_label: risk & staffing budget spike gate (blocking for accepted status)

nodes.label: Rejection of float+tolerance for scored physics (branch fork risk)
nodes.norm_label: rejection of float+tolerance for scored physics (branch fork risk)

nodes.label: ADR-0002 (REJECTED): Super Ricochet Physics API Choice
nodes.norm_label: adr-0002 (rejected): super ricochet physics api choice

nodes.label: SharedSimCore Physics Module (rejected design)
nodes.rationale: Extended SharedSimCore with fixed sub-stepping physics (sub_step_dt≈0.006818s); rejected due to fixed time step breaking distance-based tunnelling guarantee and float precision non-determinism across ARM/x86.

nodes.label: ADR-0003: Secure On-Device Auth Token Storage
nodes.norm_label: adr-0003: secure on-device auth token storage

nodes.label: ISecureTokenStore
nodes.rationale: Thin C# interface (Save/TryLoad/Clear) with iOS Keychain and Android Keystore native impls; editor mock un-shippable; fails closed on unknown platform to avoid silent plaintext fallback.

nodes.label: mutateWallet chokepoint
nodes.rationale: Single multi-leg atomic transaction chokepoint for all currency writes; two-path API (creditMultiplied vs creditFlat) prevents the reward double-dip bug; idempotency via currency_op ON CONFLICT.

nodes.label: ADR-0005: Server-Side Persistence Migration to PostgreSQL
nodes.norm_label: adr-0005: server-side persistence migration to postgresql

nodes.label: updatePlayer locked read-modify-write
nodes.rationale: Generic locked RMW (SELECT FOR UPDATE + mutate + UPDATE) for non-money JSONB player_state; reconciles GDD Rule 3 with ADR-0004's rejection of unlocked RMW for money.

nodes.label: Analytics.Emit + /events ingest
nodes.rationale: First-party durable client buffer batch-POSTs to our /events endpoint; non-blocking emit; at-least-once delivery with server dedup by eventId; money events are server-authoritative to prevent spoofing/double-count.

nodes.label: ADR-0007: Server-Side Headless Replay Re-Simulation Architecture
nodes.norm_label: adr-0007: server-side headless replay re-simulation architecture

nodes.label: verification_job queue + replay worker
nodes.rationale: Warm .NET SharedSimCore worker pool on a Postgres-backed queue with SELECT...FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED, atomic claim+reclaim, lease_epoch fencing, poison-job cap; flag-only reward model, never clawback.

nodes.label: ADR-0008: UI System — UGUI Primary, UI Toolkit Deferred
nodes.norm_label: adr-0008: ui system — ugui primary, ui toolkit deferred

nodes.label: HubNavigator
nodes.rationale: Single navigation authority with two GameObject roots (persistent-authority vs deactivatable Hub-view) so coroutines survive SetActive(false); mini-games load via Addressables additive scenes, one resident.

nodes.label: ADR-0010: Client Cache & Offline Action Queue
nodes.norm_label: adr-0010: client cache & offline action queue

nodes.label: Client SQLite durable store
nodes.rationale: One embedded SQLite DB (WAL + serialized single connection) shared by cached_state, analytics_buffer, and offline_queue; server-wins cache overwrite; remove-after-ack idempotent offline queue; tokens excluded.

nodes.label: ADR-0011: Boss Damage / Defeat Event Architecture
nodes.norm_label: adr-0011: boss damage / defeat event architecture

nodes.label: BossDamageModel
nodes.rationale: Deterministic boss HP/defeat state machine inside SharedSimCore; boss_hp -= hit count per frame; win checked before same-frame loss; client renders visuals only from same events.

nodes.label: tolerance_units_reconciliation open item
nodes.rationale: ADR-0002's bit-exact physics invalidates ADR-0001's nonzero-tolerance justification for Super Ricochet's physics path; routed to Anti-Cheat GDD owner, not silently resolved.

nodes.label: Gate Check: Systems Design to Technical Setup
nodes.norm_label: gate check: systems design to technical setup

nodes.label: Active Session State: Master Architecture Document
nodes.norm_label: active session state: master architecture document
